summary: Frontend-only MemoryHub landing page tested end-to-end. All critical flows work: page load, sticky navbar, FR/EN language switcher, Hero CTA opens JoinModal (email submit -> success -> close), nav anchor links (features/how/pricing/faq), SearchDemo typing 'Didier Martin' with client dashboard reveal, all 7 dashboard tabs, Pricing plans 19/49/99 with 'Le plus populaire' badge, all 3 pricing CTAs open modal, FAQ accordion expands, Final CTA opens modal, mobile 390x844 no horizontal overflow.
passed: Landing page loads without errors, navbar visible
Language switcher lang-en and lang-fr toggle
nav-features, nav-how, nav-pricing, nav-faq scroll/click work
fake-search-bar animates 'Didier Martin' and client-dashboard reveals
Pricing shows 19€ Solo, 49€ Pro (Le plus populaire badge), 99€ Team
pricing-cta-solo, pricing-cta-pro, pricing-cta-team all open join-modal
notes: One transient click failure on nav-pricing during the combined run was not reproducible on retry; direct pricing-cta clicks all succeeded. No blockers.
